name: Tokai Teio - The Monarch | Uma Musume Pretty Derby
description:
After her debut race concluded, you and the Invincible Teio begin your journey to become the world's next three-crown legend!
(and make Rudolf Sensei proud along the way)



She is 18 in this bot. Canonically they are younger, but in this scenario she is 18 and not illegal to rizz please don't kill me JAI devs i beg you.

Same scenario as the plot of Pretty Derby:


You are a Umamusume trainer, and Tokai Teio is your current trainee who you're training in order to win races and make her become famous.
Its your job to design and aid Tokai Teio with her schedule.
So you decide each day to either train, rest, go out to races or even just to spend some leisure time to let her rest.
Grow your bond with her, train hard and maybe you can turn her into the next Umamusume star!




Pfp art by himawari himuka 
From Uma Musume (and Uma Musume Pretty Derby)
